metaTitle: Age Calculator — Exact Age in Years, Months, Days & Hours
metaDescription: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days instantly. Find out days until your next birthday and total life statistics. 100% private & offline-first.
introSummary: Our professional Age Calculator provides more than just your current age. It delivers a comprehensive breakdown of your life journey in years, months, weeks, and even seconds. Whether you need to verify age for legal documents, calculated insurance age, or plan a countdown to your next birthday, our secure on-device tool ensures your birth data never leaves your browser.

contextUsage.title: For Legal & Official Forms
contextUsage.desc: Quickly verify your exact age for passport applications, visa forms, or school enrollment requirements.

contextUsage.title: For Insurance & Health
contextUsage.desc: Calculate your 'Insurance Age' or check eligibility for age-restricted health screenings and policies.

contextUsage.title: For Milestones & Events
contextUsage.desc: Plan the perfect surprise by knowing exactly how many days, hours, and minutes are left until a major birthday.

howto.description: Use the intuitive date picker to choose your birth year, month, and day. We support historical dates for genealogy research.
The tool immediately compares your DOB with the current time (or a custom date) using high-precision logic.
View your age broken down into years, months, and days, plus 'fun stats' like total weeks or days lived.
Check the dedicated countdown section to see exactly how long you have to wait for your next celebration.

why: Precision Logic — Accounts for leap years and different month lengths (28, 30, or 31 days) for 100% accuracy.
Comprehensive Breakdown — Get your age in years/months/days, but also in total days, weeks, and hours lived.
Birthday Countdown — Automatically calculates the remaining days until your next anniversary.
100% Privacy — Your date of birth is sensitive; our tool processes everything locally so no data is ever uploaded.
Zero Latency — Works instantly and even functions offline, perfect for quick checks on the go.
Customizable Reference — Calculate what your age will be on a specific future date for retirement planning.

faq.q: How accurate is this age calculation?
faq.a: Our algorithm uses a full-date comparison method that considers the exact number of days in every month and accounts for leap years, ensuring your chronological age is perfectly accurate.

faq.q: Is my birth date data secure?
faq.a: Yes. Unlike other websites, we do not send your birth date to a server. All calculations happen inside your browser's memory and are cleared as soon as you close the tab.

faq.q: Can I calculate my age on a specific future date?
faq.a: Yes, our tool allows you to set a 'Calculation Date' so you can see how old you will be at a specific event, like a wedding or retirement start date.
While it provides exact chronological age, insurance companies often round up if you are past the 6-month mark of your current year. You can easily see your months/days to determine this.

faq.q: Why does my age in days seem so large?
faq.a: Time flies! When you break down years into days, the numbers grow quickly. It's a great way to appreciate the total time you've spent on your journey so far.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Precise age tracking for legal and medical documentation
Ensures accuracy even if you were born on February 29th
Detailed life-stat analysis for personal milestones

troubleshooting: Date picker not showing? Ensure your browser is up to date, or manually enter the date in the YYYY-MM-DD format.
Calculating for a future date? Ensure the 'Date of Birth' is earlier than the 'Calculation Date' to avoid negative results.
Timezone differences? The tool uses your local device time for the 'Today' reference to ensure relevance to your location.
proTips: Use the 'Total Days Lived' stat for fun social media posts or unique anniversary celebrations.
For developers or HR managers, use this to quickly verify if someone meets the '18+' or '21+' age requirement for specific tasks.
If you're planning a trip, calculate your age at the time of departure to ensure your documents and insurance are valid.
